n_gram.method: 8-gram Jaccard on input.instruction + flattened brief text
n_gram.threshold: max overlap < 0.20 between any held_out and any train task

embedding_similarity.threshold: cosine < 0.85 between any held_out and any train task

time_shift.method: every task referencing public signal must include signal_window_start/end and the window must end >= 2025-08-01 (post-Crunchbase ODM cutoff)

duplicate_inputs.method: exact md5 of normalized input.instruction + brief — must be unique across all partitions

preference_leakage.method: for any task carrying both reference_chosen and reference_rejected, metadata.chosen_source_model and metadata.rejected_source_model must come from different model families (Anthropic, OpenAI, Qwen, DeepSeek)
preference_leakage.note: v0.1.0-interim ships 2 fully-paired examples (TB-TRAIN-001, TB-DEV-007) as templates; the full preference set is generated in Act III from train/ and audited again before training.
